title: draba incana var. arabisans
intro: Draba incana var. arabisans, also known as Alpine whitlowgrass, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alpine whitlowgrass include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, and act as an antioxidant. Alpine whitlowgrass can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
